name: PixWars 3
author: Poki
description: PixWars 3 is an intense cooperative third-person shooter game where you battle relentless zombie hordes across eight thrilling campaign maps. Team up with friends, choose your difficulty level—from Easy to Legend—and dive into other action-packed modes like Skywars, Zombie Horde, Battle Zone, and Sumo Arena. Do you have what it takes to survive the ultimate zombie apocalypse in PixWars 3? How do I play PixWars 3? Move: WASD or Arrow Jump: Spacebar Interact: E Pause: Escape Use your mouse aim and shoot! Who created PixWars 3? PixWars 3 is created by NadGames. Play their other games on Poki: Bomber Royale , Combat Online , Combat Online 2 , Combat Reloaded , Combat Reloaded 2 , PixWars 2 and Rebels Clash ! How can I play PixWars 3 for free? You can play PixWars 3 for free on Poki. Can I play PixWars 3 on mobile devices and desktop? PixWars 3 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play PixWars 3 with my friend? Yes! PixWars 3 is a multiplayer game so you can play online with your friends!
